title: Duas for every night of Ramadan

duas.title: Duas to be Recited Every Night in the Holy Month of Ramadan
Allahumma Rabba Shahri Ramadan
duas.description: Sayyid ibn Tawus has mentioned that if one says the following supplication each night in Ramadan, his sins of forty years will be forgiven for him:

segments.translation: O Allah, the Lord of the month of Ramadan
in which You have revealed the Qur'an
and made obligatory fasting in this month upon Your servants!
Please, send blessings to Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad
and provide me with the opportunity to go to Your ‘Sacred House’ for pilgrimage

segments.arabic: فِي هٰذَا ٱلْعَامِ وَفِي كُلِّ عَامٍ
segments.transliteration: fi hadha al`ami wa fi kulli `amin
segments.translation: in this year and in all years.
Forgive my overbearing sins,
for verily no one other than You can forgive them.
O All-beneficent! O All-knowing!

duas.reference: 7 Iqbal, 61. Bihar, xciii, 312, b 38, h 5, from Hidayah. Kafcami’s Misbah, 618. Balad, 223.

duas.title: Day & Night Dua from Imam Sadiq (as)
duas.description: Imam al-sadiq (a.s) is reported to have instructed to say the following supplication every day/night in Ramadan month :

segments.arabic: اللّهُمَّ إنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ أَنْ تَجْعَلَ فِيمَا تَقْضِي وَتُقَدِّرُ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as'aluka an taj`ala fima taqdi wa tuqaddiru
segments.translation: O Allah :I beseech You that You,

segments.arabic: مِنَ الأَمْرِ الْمَحْتُومِ فِي الأَمْرِ الْحَكِيمِ
segments.transliteration: min al-amri almahtumi fi al-amri alhakimi
segments.translation: while taking decisions and rendering possible things and events decisively

segments.arabic: مِنَ الْقَضَاءِ الَّذِي لا يُرَدُّ وَلا يُبَدَّلُ
segments.transliteration: min alqada'i alladhi la yuraddu wa la yubaddalu
segments.translation: (decisions which can not be changed or bypassed),

segments.arabic: أَنْ تَكْتُبَنِي مِنْ حُجَّاجِ بَيْتِكَ الْحَرَامِ
segments.transliteration: an taktubani min hujjaji baytika alharami
segments.translation: write my name in the list of those pilgrims of Your Holy House
whose pilgrimage receives Your approval,
whose efforts are appreciated,
whose sins are forgiven,
whose wrongdoings are overlooked;

segments.transliteration: wa an taj`ala fima taqdi wa tuqaddiru
segments.translation: that You, while making decisions and rendering possible things and events;

segments.arabic: أَنْ تُطِيلَ عُمْرِي فِي خَيْرٍ وَعَافِيَةٍ،
segments.translation: make possible for me long life, goodness, welfare,
and enough means of livelihood,

segments.transliteration: wa taj`alani mimman tantasiru bihi lidinika
segments.translation: and let me be like him whom You helps with Your Religion;
not substituting any other in my place.

duas.reference: 1 Kafi, iv, 161, h 3. Tahdhib, iii, 102, h 36. Tusi’s Misbah, 630. Iqbal. 61. Kafami’s Misbah, 582

segments.transliteration: allahumma birahmatika fi alssalihina fa adkhilna
segments.translation: O Allah, (please do) include us with the righteous ones, out of Your mercy,
uplift us to the rank of `illiyyin (most elevated rank),
serve us with water
running out of spring of Salsabil,

segments.transliteration: wa min alhuri al`ini birahmatika fazawwijna
segments.translation: out of Your mercy, give us as wives the Paradisiacal women,
make the Paradisiacal youths who never alter in age
and who are like hidden pearls serve us,

segments.arabic: وَمِنْ ثِمَارِ ٱلْجَنَّةِ وَلُحُومِ ٱلطَّيْرِ فَأَطْعِمْنَا
segments.transliteration: wa min thimari aljannati wa luhumi alttayri fa'at`imna
segments.translation: give us food from the fruits of Paradise and from the meat of birds there,

segments.arabic: وَمِنْ ثِيَابِ ٱلسُّنْدُسِ وَٱلْحَرِيرِ وَٱلإِسْتَبْرَقِ فَأَلْبِسْنَا
segments.transliteration: wa min thiyabi alssundusi walhariri wal-istabraqi fa'albisna
segments.translation: dress us from the clothes of fine and thick silk and rich brocade,
give us success to catch the Grand Night,
lead us to pilgrimage to Your Holy House

segments.transliteration: wa qatlan fi sabilika fawaffiq lana
segments.translation: and martyrdom in Your way,

segments.transliteration: wa saliha alddu`a'i walmas'alati fastajib lana
segments.translation: and respond to our goodly prayer and supplication.

segments.arabic: وَإِذَا جَمَعْتَ ٱلأَوَّلِينَ وَٱلآخِرِينَ يَوْمَ ٱلْقِيَامَةِ فَٱرْحَمْنَا
segments.transliteration: wa idha jama`ta al-awwalina wal-akhirina yawma alqiyamati farhamna
segments.translation: When You shall gather the past and the coming generations on the Resurrection Day, (please) have mercy upon us.

segments.transliteration: wa bara'atan min alnnari faktub lana
segments.translation: (Please) release us from Hellfire.
Do not fetter us in Hell,

segments.transliteration: wa fi `adhabika wa hawanika fala tabtalina
segments.translation: do not try us through Your chastisement and humiliations,

segments.transliteration: wa min alzzuqqumi walddari`i fala tut`imna
segments.translation: do not feed us from zaqqum and thorns,
do not add us to the devils,

segments.arabic: وَفِي ٱلنَّارِ عَلَىٰ وُجُوهِنَا فَلاَ تَكْبُبْنَا
segments.transliteration: wa fi alnnari `ala wujuhina fala takbubna
segments.translation: do not throw us down on our faces in Hellfire,

segments.arabic: وَمِنْ ثِيَابِ ٱلنَّارِ وَسَرَابِيلِ ٱلْقَطِرَانِ فَلاَ تُلْبِسْنَا
segments.transliteration: wa min thiyabi alnnari wa sarabili alqatirani fala tulbisna
segments.translation: do not dress us from the clothes of fire and the shirts of tar,

segments.arabic: وَمِنْ كُلِّ سُوءٍ يَا لاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ
segments.transliteration: wa min kulli su'in ya la ilaha illa anta
segments.translation: and save us from all evils; O He save Whom there is no god!

segments.arabic: بِحَقِّ لاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ فَنَجِّنَا
segments.transliteration: bihaqqi la ilaha illa anta fanajjina
segments.translation: I beseech You in the name of there is no god save You.

duas.title: Aauzo be Jalale

segments.translation: I seek refuge with the majesty of Your Honorable Face,
Against that the month of Ramadan elapses

segments.arabic: أَوْ يَطْلُعَ الْفَجْرُ مِنْ لَيْلَتِي هذِهِ
segments.transliteration: aw yatlu`a alfajru min laylati hadhihi
segments.translation: Or dawn breaks this night,

segments.arabic: وَلَكَ قِبَلِي تَبِعَةٌ أَوْ ذَنْبٌ تُعَذِّبُنِي عَلَيْهِ.
segments.transliteration: wa laka qibali tabi`atun aw dhanbun tu`adhdhibuni `alayhi
segments.translation: And there is still a sin or an offense in my record for which You may chastise me.

duas.reference: 1 The supplication is also cited in the following sources, where it is recommended for every night of the last ten days of Ramadan: Kafi, iv, 160, h 1; Faqih, ii, 161, h 2032; Muqnicah, 189 (with a slight difference); Iqbal, 199, thence in Bihar, xcv, 156.

segments.translation: O my God, the beseechers have stood at Your Door,
the poor have resorted to Your refuge,

segments.arabic: وَوَقَفَتْ سَفِينَةُ ٱلمسَاكِينِ عَلَىٰ سَاحِلِ بَحْرِ جُودِكَ وَكَرَمِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa waqafat safinatu almasakini `ala sahili bahri judika wa karamika
segments.translation: and the ship of the needy have cast anchor near the coast of the sea of Your Magnanimity and Generosity,

segments.arabic: يَرْجُونَ ٱلجَوَازَ إِلَىٰ سَاحَةِ رَحْمَتِكَ وَنِعْمَتِكَ
segments.transliteration: yarjuna aljawaza ila sahati rahmatika wa ni`matika
segments.translation: hoping for permission to enter the yard of Your Mercy and Favor.

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي إِنْ كُنْتَ لاَ تَرْحَم فِي هٰذَا ٱلشَّهْرِ ٱلشَّرِيفِ
segments.transliteration: ilahi in kunta la tarhamu fi hadha alshshahri alshsharifi
segments.translation: O my God, If You, in this holy month, will have mercy upon none

segments.arabic: إِلاَّ مَنْ أَخْلَصَ لَكَ فِي صِيَامِهِ وَقِيَامِهِ
segments.transliteration: illa man akhlasa laka fi siyamihi wa qiyamihi
segments.translation: but those who sincerely observe fasting and do acts of worship to You,
who will then stand for the sinful and the negligent

segments.arabic: إِذَا غَرِقَ فِي بَحْرِ ذُنُوبِهِ وَآثَامِهِ
segments.transliteration: idha ghariqa fi bahri dhunubihi wa athamihi
segments.translation: then they sink in the ocean of their sins and offenses?

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي إِنْ كُنْتَ لاَ تَرْحَم إِلاَّ ٱلْمُطِيعِينَ
segments.transliteration: ilahi in kunta la tarhamu illa almuti`ina
segments.translation: O my God, if you have mercy upon non but the obedient to You,
who will then stand for the disobedient?

segments.arabic: وَإِنْ كُنْتَ لاَ تَقْبَل إِلاَّ مِنَ ٱلعَامِلِينَ
segments.transliteration: wa in kunta la taqbalu illa min al`amilina
segments.translation: If You accept none but those who do acts of worship to You,
who will then stand for the negligent?
O my God, the observers of fasting have won,
the doers of acts of worship to You have prospered,
and those who act sincerely have been saved.
But we, Your sinful servants, beseech Your mercy;
so, (please do) have mercy upon us,
release us from the chastisement of Hellfire, out of Your pardon,
and forgive our sins,
in the name of Your mercy. O most Merciful of all those who show mercy!

_index_meta.title: Duas for every night of Ramadan
